era: Seattle, 2010s. Solo project of Brit Bachmann. Warm, melodic electronic music with organic textures.

location.formative: Seattle indie electronic scene. Organic electronic aesthetics. Warm production. Intimate scale.
location.career: Campfire OK -- Indie Electronic. Brit Bachmann. Warm, melodic electronic music with organic textures. E=4.

associated_musicians.name: Gold Casio
associated_musicians.note: Both indie electronic. Gold Casio is retro-synthetic. Campfire OK is organic-synthetic. Same umbrella, different textures.

associated_musicians.name: NAVVI
associated_musicians.note: Both atmospheric electronic. NAVVI is dark, cold. Campfire OK is warm, organic. Opposite temperatures.

associated_musicians.name: ODESZA
associated_musicians.note: Both warm electronic. ODESZA is large-scale. Campfire OK is intimate. Both warm, different scales.

associated_musicians.name: Summer Heart
associated_musicians.note: Both warm, melodic electronic at E=4. Summer Heart is temporal warmth. Campfire OK is material warmth.

associated_musicians.name: Hecuba
associated_musicians.note: Consecutive degrees, maximum contrast. Hecuba is E=5, confrontational. Campfire OK is E=4, inviting.

theory_nodes.concept: The organic circuit (one hundred and third acoustic element -- warm electronic music with organic textures; synths that breathe; current flowing through wood; digital precision with human warmth; breathing dynamics; intimate spatial quality; nature-electronic intersection)
examples: Campfire OK (degree 102) -- warm synths with organic grain. Breathing dynamics. 103rd acoustic element.
Contrast with the kinetic surge (degree 101, Hecuba) -- raw voltage. The organic circuit is gentle current.
Contrast with the nostalgic cascade (degree 100, Summer Heart) -- temporal warmth. The organic circuit is material warmth.
One hundred and three acoustic elements at the second post-centennial degree.
theory_nodes.description: The organic circuit is the 103rd acoustic element. Warm electronic with organic textures. Synths that breathe. Digital precision with human warmth.

ancestors: The kinetic surge (degree 101, Hecuba) -- raw voltage. The organic circuit is gentle current.
The nostalgic cascade (degree 100, Summer Heart) -- temporal warmth. The organic circuit is material warmth.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred and three acoustic elements across one hundred and two degrees.

theory_nodes.concept: The warm circuiteer (one hundred and third artist-city pattern -- solo artist wiring warmth into electronic circuits; Brit Bachmann; organic electronic from Seattle; campfire as gathering; invitation not confrontation; the circuit meets the campfire)
examples: Campfire OK (degree 102) -- Brit Bachmann, solo, warm organic electronic. 103rd artist-city pattern.
Contrast with the dance floor provocateur (degree 101, Hecuba) -- confrontation. The warm circuiteer invites.
Electronic-adjacent pattern density: seven distinct patterns in eight degrees (95-102).
theory_nodes.description: The warm circuiteer is the 103rd artist-city pattern. Solo artist. Organic electronic warmth. Campfire gathering. Invitation over confrontation.

ancestors: The dance floor provocateur (degree 101, Hecuba) -- confrontation. The warm circuiteer is invitation.
The self-released synthesist (degree 98, Gold Casio) -- retro warmth. The warm circuiteer is organic warmth.
genealogy.relationship: One hundred and three artist-city patterns across one hundred and two degrees.

theory_nodes.concept: Indie Electronic at Genre Stage 84 -- returning genre classification with distinct organic texture; warm and melodic; distinct from retro-synthetic (Gold Casio) and dance-oriented (Hecuba); nature-synthetic variant
examples: Campfire OK (degree 102) -- Indie Electronic at Genre Stage 84.
Organic variant distinct from Gold Casio's retro Indie Electronic (98) and STRFKR's punk Indie Electronic (96).
Thirteenth electronic-adjacent entry in seventeen degrees.
theory_nodes.description: Genre Stage 84. Indie Electronic. Organic variant. Warm, melodic, nature-synthetic. Returning genre, new texture.

ancestors: Dance/Electronic at Genre Stage 83 (degree 101, Hecuba). The genre differentiates further at 102.
genealogy.relationship: Genre Stage 84 at degree 102. Track at 103.

theory_nodes.concept: Energy oscillation within the electronic era -- E=4 (97-100), E=5 (101), E=4 (102); the engine breathes; intensity rises and falls; Campfire OK is the exhale after Hecuba's surge
examples: Degree 102 -- E=4. Down from E=5 at 101. The engine breathes.
Oscillation: E=4 at 100 (Summer Heart), E=5 at 101 (Hecuba), E=4 at 102 (Campfire OK).
theory_nodes.description: Energy oscillation. E=4 returns. The engine breathes within the electronic era. Surge and exhale.

ancestors: E=5 at degree 101 (Hecuba). The engine surges then breathes.

cross_references.relationship: INDIE ELECTRONIC SPECTRUM. Both indie electronic at E=4. Gold Casio is retro-synthetic, vintage-referencing. Campfire OK is organic-synthetic, nature-referencing. Same genre umbrella, different textures.
ELECTRONIC TEXTURE CONTRAST. Both atmospheric electronic. NAVVI is dark, nocturnal, cold reverb. Campfire OK is warm, organic, natural grain. Opposite temperatures.
ELECTRONIC WARMTH. Both warm electronic. ODESZA is large-scale with cinematic scope (E=5). Campfire OK is small-scale with intimate scope (E=4). Both warm, different scales.
ELECTRONIC POP WARMTH. Both warm, melodic electronic at E=4. Summer Heart is temporal warmth (nostalgia). Campfire OK is material warmth (organic textures). Different sources of warmth.
ELECTRONIC ERA CONTRAST. Consecutive degrees, maximum contrast. Hecuba is E=5, confrontational, pounding. Campfire OK is E=4, inviting, warm. Surge and circuit, provocation and invitation.
